title: EPISODE 2: Strengthening Ties with the UBC Filipino Community ft. Sulong UBC
description: HELLOOO! Glad to see you’ve come back for more… This episode we invited our lovely friends, Clarissa (she/they) and Noreen (they/them) from Sulong UBC to discuss their club’s goals and initiatives. As the only two Filipinx clubs on campus, we share the same goal of uniting the Filipinx communities on campus; whether they are students, workers, educators, and more, both Sulong and Kaba want to create a warm university community that can always rely on each other in times of need. Also tune in to a few funny Filipino family stories we have hehe.
